s1.ptxt: When ignition is ON (without engine running) and check if the P/S warning light (1) comes on. If the P/S warning light does not come on, go to P/S Warning Light Does Not Come ON with Ignition ON before Engine Starts of the diagnostic flows.

Start engine and check if the P/S warning light turns off. If P/S warning light remains on and no DTC is stored in P/S control module, go to P/S Warning Light Remains ON Steady after Engine Starts for troubleshooting.
